text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Whew, this Fan Fest was terrific! Oh!<n>Student over there! Please do your<n>best next year too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Will do! Thank you for coming!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Thanks for today, Bamboo. Sorry I<n>asked you to step in at the last<n>minute.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Course. It was no problem at all!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I gotta say though, when you<n>suddenly called to ask if I still had last<n>year's outfit, it sure did throw me for<n>a loop!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You got in touch so quickly, too... You<n>must've been looking out for King the<n>whole time, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Hey Nature, good work! I heard<n>from Pearl. You took charge of<n>reorganizing the cheer locations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's nothing. Anyone<n>could've done that. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: Captain! The Fan Fest went<n>amazingly, didn't it!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: Let's all go out to celebrate! Are you<n>good at karaoke?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: By that point, I think the whole squad<n>was on board with our leader<n>anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (Now that the Fan Fest is over,<n>we've gone back to our normal,<n>cheer-practice-free lives. We might<n>not have a squad captain anymore,<n>but...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: How many times, Sky?! Next time, I<n>won't be so forgiving!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Hey, King. These free spirit<n>types giving you a hard time?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good to see you, Nature.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I hear your rivalry with Teio is heating<n>up. The people from the shopping<n>district told me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urk... Those guys don't know how to<n>keep a secret.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe! If you ever need a training<n>partner, let me know! I'm happy to<n>help you out anytime!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: In that case, how about you come for<n>coffee with me every once in a while?<n>Just having someone to vent to a little<n>would be help enough.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And, while we're there, I can<n>encourage a certain former cheer<n>captain in all her hard work too. If she<n>needs it, of course.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why not!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Were you thinking of going to a cafe?<n>Or the shopping district, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't mind either way. The vending<n>machine that sells red bean soup<n>would work just fine too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (...King and I still hold on to a little of<n>the camaraderie we shared in those<n>cheer squad days together.)
